title: bidens bipinnata var. cynapiifolia
intro: Bidens bipinnata var. cynapiifolia, also known as the bipinnate beggar-ticks, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its bipinnate leaves and clusters of small, white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bidens bipinnata var. cynapiifolia include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Bidens bipinnata var. cynapiifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and health.
